Evals are how you measure whether mitigation is working.
MCP gives agents the tools they need to act in their loop.
Both topics concern what you must not let leave the perimeter.

Web Vitals measure end-user latency outcomes.
Less client state usually means more reliance on the API contract.
Design systems are documentation in code form.

Migrations and the ORM model define the same shape from two sides.
Background jobs usually run on top of a queue.

Realtime is where scaling assumptions break first.
Vector stores are the core retrieval primitive for context engineering.
Edge placement is one of the most impactful latency wins.
Uploads feed pipelines; pipelines serve uploads.

AI review is an extension of human review craft.
